text: This looks like science fiction, but wait for it. At first it opens like a tiny star But pressure is building In the blink of an eye It turns itself inside out and fires a sticky spore packet up to twenty feet away Fittingly its called The Artillery Fungus captured in gorgeous detail by Scottish fungi
